# Filtros

<!-- Generated by dd2md from Datadog Synthetics -->
<!-- Source: jkc-g3g-ccb.json -->
## Preconditions
- Browser is open and ready

## Steps
1. Navigate to https://stayforlong.com/?market=es&lang=es
2. Close the exclusive offers popup
3. Enter 'barcelona' in travel destination field
4. Select Barcelona from dropdown results
5. Click search button
6. Select Excellent rating filter (9 or more)
7. Click on property count 5
8. Select Villa property type filter
9. Select Villa property type filter again
10. Select Spa amenity filter
11. Check Adults only theme option
